Research cycle preparation clears only prior official-subagent evidence files inside the selected mission directory.
Mission preparation clears only stale summary, evidence, and gate artifacts inside the selected mission directory.
The standalone parent runner removes only its run-unique temporary parent-summary file after reading it.
Failed official-subagent outcomes remove only the stale parent-summary artifact in the active artifact directory.
The DB route check writes only package.json inside its mkdtemp-owned fixture repository.
The DB route check removes only the mkdtemp-owned fixture root in its finally block.
The official-subagent workflow check removes only its temporary fixture repository in its finally block.
The provider-interface check removes only its mkdtemp-owned Super Search mission fixture in its finally block.
Managed-path removal unlinks only a regular non-symlink file proven confined under the requested boundary.
Managed-path move renames only source and destination paths proven confined under the same boundary.
MCP backup creation applies 0700 only to the verified backup directory under the selected Codex home.
The official Codex CLI adapter writes only config.toml in its per-call isolated temporary Codex home.
The official Codex CLI adapter removes only its per-call temporary transform root in finally.
MCP health-channel close terminates only the process group of the child it spawned.
Release latency measurement removes only its mkdtemp-owned fixture root in finally.
MCP latency measurement writes only its generated config fixture under the run-local temp root.
Update-cache latency measurement writes only its synthetic cache fixture under the run-local temp root.
SSH latency measurement writes only its fake worker fixture under the run-local temp root.
Menu Bar latency measurement writes only cache, build-stamp, and source fixtures under the run-local temp root.
Release-closure writer writes only the version-scoped closure manifest path derived from the release root.
Stage verifier writes only private inputs and receipts inside its run-unique review directory.
Stage verifier reapplies 0600 only to the private file it just wrote.
Stage verification sets owner-only modes only on its transaction root, downloaded tarball, and final review directory.
Stage verification atomically promotes only its completed run-unique review directory to the requested output path.
Failed stage verification removes only its run-unique temporary review directory.
Tarball content scanning removes only its mkdtemp extraction root in finally.
Release receipt writer persists only the caller-selected version-scoped release JSON artifact.
Unpacked-byte measurement removes only its mkdtemp tar extraction root in finally.
Telegram owner recovery renames only the configured lock after proving its owner stale.
Telegram owner locking unlinks only a stale quarantine or the same-owner configured lock.
Telegram heartbeat overwrites only the configured owner lock after verifying the same owner nonce.
Temporary update smoke removes only its mkdtemp package-install root in finally.
Update operation recording applies 0600 only to its operation receipt and latest-receipt files.
Update cache migration removes only legacy cache files successfully converted into the current cache.
Architecture checking writes only architecture-check.json under its configured report directory.
Current-surface E2E writes only timeout and rotation artifacts inside its isolated fixture root.
Current-surface E2E removes only its mkdtemp-owned upgrade fixture root in finally.
Upgrade fixture seeding writes only managed and customer-preservation fixtures under isolated project, HOME, and global roots.
Upgrade fixture seeding writes only legacy Codex config fixtures under isolated HOME and global roots.
Current-surface fixture writes only legacy and preservation artifacts under its isolated project, HOME, and global roots.
Current-surface fixture writes only legacy Codex configs under its isolated project and global roots.
Current-surface fixture writes only a generated SKS skill manifest under its isolated fixture directory.
Current upgrade matrix removes only the mkdtemp-owned fixture directory recorded by the check.
Current upgrade matrix writes only config and skill fixtures under its mkdtemp-owned test roots.
MAD-SKS boundary check writes only global and project Codex config fixtures under its isolated temp root.
MAD-SKS boundary check writes only isolated global and project Codex config fixtures.
Upgrade smoke isolation writes only npm, package, launchctl, and log fixtures inside its sandbox.
Upgrade smoke cleanup removes only the sandbox path created for that smoke run.
Upgrade smoke sealing applies read-only mode only to the copied sandbox tarball.
Runtime script closure check writes only its configured JSON report artifact.
